question:
Consider the following statements about the Indira Gandhi Prize for Peace, Disarmament and Development for 2023 :
I. Daniel Barenboim was announced as winner of the Indira Gandhi Prize 2023 for his efforts to solve economic crisis and his contribution in the development of Sri Lanka.
II. Ali Abu Awwad was announced as winner of the Indira Gandhi Prize 2023 for his efforts towards a non-violent resolution of the Israel-Palestine conflict.
III. The International Jury of the Indira Gandhi Prize for Peace, Disarmament and Development for 2023 was chaired by former Chief Justice of India, R.M. Lodha.
Which among the above given statements are incorrect ?
Which among the following rare natural phenomenon is going to happen in 2024, after 221 years, in the United States of America ?
Which among the following are incorrectly paired with regard to Swachh Surveskhan Awards 2023 ?
